name: elegy-mcp
description: Governed skill definition for Elegy's current dedicated MCP surface: thin descriptor authoring and analysis flows over governed MCP artifacts.

metadata.summary: Current dedicated descriptor authoring and analysis over governed MCP shapes without claiming unsupported REST or OpenAPI execution paths.

triggers.description: When work involves Elegy's current dedicated MCP descriptor authoring or analysis surface.
When a governed MCP descriptor needs to be authored from explicit tool inputs.
When a governed MCP descriptor needs to be analyzed for tool schema viability.
When descriptor-scoped MCP work should use the dedicated CLI surface instead of broader runtime claims.

constraints.description: This surface is limited to descriptor authoring and analysis over governed MCP shapes.
Do not claim OpenAPI ingestion, REST execution, or hosted MCP runtime behavior through this CLI unless those paths are explicitly implemented elsewhere.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output path for a newly authored MCP descriptor.

parameters.name: transport
parameters.description: Optional transport for authoring. Supported values: stdio or http.

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: Repeated tool spec in NAME or NAME=DESCRIPTION form when authoring.

parameters.name: descriptor
parameters.description: Path to a governed MCP descriptor for analysis.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Allow overwriting an existing authored descriptor file.

output.description: Command-scoped descriptor authoring or analysis reports for the dedicated MCP surface.
